title: psychotria umbrosa
intro: Psychotria umbrosa, also known as Hairy Alkekengi or Yonyucao, is a plant species native to Asia, belonging to the Rubiaceae family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Psychotria umbrosa contains compounds with medicinal properties, including alkaloids and phenolic acids, which exhibit anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Psychotria umbrosa is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the affected area.
